evaluation.summary: The experiment shows exponential decay of truncation error with λ≈0.8 for high-order LDAB expansions at primorial indices, but does not demonstrate novelty or impact beyond confirming known behavior.
next_directions: Validate the λ=0.8 decay across a broader range of orders and error metrics
Compare LDAB error behavior with alternative asymptotic models to assess novelty
Develop a theoretical framework linking primorial scaling to error decay to establish a new insight
